# netbox_tenant (Resource)

Manages a Tenant in Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_tenant" "example" {
  name        = "Example Tenant"
  slug        = "example-tenant"
  description = "Created via terraform-provider-netbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the tenant.

### Optional

- `custom_fields` (Map of String) Custom field values as a map of field name to string value.
- `description` (String) Description for the tenant.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the tenant. If omitted, auto-generated from name.
- `tags` (Set of Number) Set of tag IDs to assign to the tenant.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the tenant.
